samples.notes: Crude univariate ORs were extracted from Table 3; adjusted ORs and TV viewing were excluded. Continuous lifestyle variables were categorized as low, middle, and high according to the 25th and 75th percentiles. 95% CIs: sport team/club 0.48–1.01; LTPA low 0.82–1.87; LTPA high 0.46–1.12; video games low 0.78–1.78; video games high 0.70–1.70.

samples.notes: Unadjusted odds ratios extracted from Table 2 only; adjusted ORs were not extracted. For bm-pa: 95% CI 0.72 to 0.85, p < 0.001. For bm-vg: 95% CI 1.34 to 2.04, p < 0.001. For pa-vg correlation: p = 0.3. Age was reported as median 8.0 years, not mean. The article states the environmental-variable instruments were not formally tested for reproducibility, reliability, or validity.
